candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line for the company; represents petroleum sales and matches top-line revenue concept.
Balancing line, not a true operating revenue measure; only used if primary revenue line were missing.

variables.notes: Use Petroleum Revenues as main REVT; Balancing Item - Revenue is a fallback if needed for some years.
No suitable COGS/cost of sales candidate provided in the candidate list.

candidates.why: Operating income line but represents income, not overhead expense; does not fit SG&A expense definition.
Explicit overhead/administrative expense; classic SG&A component even though values are currently nan in preview.
Overhead-type operating expenses distinct from COGS, depreciation, or impairments; fits SG&A bucket.
Additional bucket of other operating expenses; also fits SG&A-type overhead.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Other operating income' because it is income, not an expense. Selected all expense-type overhead components as SG&A components.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related labor costs; part of R&D expense.
Direct and explicit R&D expense line; best match for R&D expense concept.
Balance sheet development asset, not a period R&D expense; should not be used for XRD.
Gross development asset on balance sheet, not an expense; not appropriate for XRD.

variables.notes: Use the explicit R&D expense line first; labor-related R&D costs as a secondary/fallback source.

candidates.why: Primary P&L line capturing interest expense; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a subset of total interest expense and valid if main interest expense line is missing for some periods.
Interest that is capitalized rather than expensed; not part of interest expense in P&L for PROF, so should not be primary XINT.
Represents allocation of profit to non-controlling interests, not interest expense; inappropriate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as an additional fallback for XINT when other lines are unavailable.
Balance sheet liability; not an expense line, so not appropriate for XINT.
Accrued but unpaid interest balance; balance sheet item, not the period’s expense flow.
Debt principal, not expense; not suitable for XINT.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests, not an interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Exclude capitalized interest and balance sheet debt items from XINT; prioritize the main interest expense line, then lease-interest-related lines as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Tax line affecting equity but not total book equity itself; not suitable as BE.
Component of equity, not total book equity; use only if a total were unavailable.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity; best match for book equity.
Duplicate total equity label (different casing); useful fallback if primary label structure changes over time.
Balancing adjustment, not an economic total; not appropriate for BE unless no better option.
Balancing line, not the main total equity measure; less desirable than 'Total Equity'.
Represents assets or liabilities+equity total, not equity alone; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the overall balance sheet; not a direct equity measure.

variables.notes: Use Total Equity as primary book equity; Total equity (lowercase) as a secondary label for consistency across years.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to non-controlling interests; valid indicator of minority interest but not the balance sheet stock.
Balance sheet minority interest (non-controlling interests); best representation for MIB as equity attributable to minorities.

variables.notes: Prioritize balance sheet Minority Interest as the main MIB measure; income statement Minority Interest as fallback if needed for some years.
